title: Project Report: Sales Pipeline Automation — Salesforce CRM Developer / Administrator
author: Gagan Pasupuleti
summary: Lead conversion, opportunity stages, approval process for discounts, and Lightning dashboard.
source_file: CodeQuest project specification (official docs + industry patterns)

chapters.title: Project Overview
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Project Overview** *(Level: Intermediate)*

**Sales Pipeline Automation** is a intermediate-level end-to-end project for Salesforce CRM Developer / Administrator. Duration: 3–4 weeks. Lead conversion, opportunity stages, approval process for discounts, and Lightning dashboard. Tools: Salesforce DE, Process Builder/Flow.

Code Reference:
```text
Objective: Lead conversion process
Objective: Opportunity stage validation rules
Objective: Discount approval process
Objective: Sales manager Lightning dashboard
```
What it shows: Lists measurable outcomes before you start building.

### What it actually is
A project overview defines scope, tools, and success criteria.

### When to use it
At project kickoff.

### Where to use it
Salesforce CRM Developer / Administrator portfolios and CodeQuest project submissions.

### Real use example
A candidate lists this project on a Salesforce CRM Developer / Administrator resume with a demo link.
key_takeaways: A project overview defines scope, tools, and success criteria.
A candidate lists this project on a Salesforce CRM Developer / Administrator resume with a demo link.

chapters.title: Final Deliverables and Review
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Final Deliverables and Review** *(Level: Intermediate)*

Submit all final deliverables: DE config; Approval demo; Dashboard screenshot. Skills demonstrated: CRM, Automation, Approvals. Prepare a 5-minute walkthrough video and README for CodeQuest teacher marking.

Code Reference:
```text
Deliverable: DE config
Deliverable: Approval demo
Deliverable: Dashboard screenshot
```
What it shows: Final checklist ensures nothing is missing at submission.

### What it actually is
Deliverable review confirms end-to-end project completion.

### When to use it
Before deadline and teacher review.

### Where to use it
CodeQuest project gallery and interviews.

### Real use example
A student submits DE config and passes the rubric.
